privacy.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: Zova Sport respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you shop with us and how we use it.
We collect account details (name, email), order information (shipping address, phone, items purchased), and technical data such as browser type for security and site performance.
We use your information to process orders, provide customer support, improve our services, and send transactional emails about your purchases.
We do not sell your personal data. Payment processing for card orders is handled by Stripe according to their privacy policy.
You may update your profile in account settings or contact us to request access or deletion of your data, subject to legal retention requirements.
We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
paragraphs: Zova Sport delivers across supported regions using trusted courier partners.
Standard delivery typically takes 2–5 business days after your order is confirmed. Remote areas may require additional time.
Shipping fees, if any, are shown at checkout before you place your order.
Cash on delivery (COD) is available in supported areas. Card payment via Stripe is also offered where configured.
Once your order ships, you will receive email updates when the order status changes in our system.
For delivery issues or address changes before shipping, contact customer support with your order number.

returns.title: Returns Policy
paragraphs: We want you to be satisfied with your Zova Sport purchase. If something is not right, contact us within 14 days of delivery.
Items must be unworn, in original packaging, and include proof of purchase. Customized Nike By You products may not be eligible for return.
To start a return, email support with your order number and reason. We will provide return instructions for your region.
Refunds are processed to your original payment method after we receive and inspect the returned items. COD orders may receive store credit or bank transfer where applicable.
Defective or incorrect items are covered at no extra cost. Shipping fees for discretionary returns may apply unless the error was ours.

contact.title: Contact Us
paragraphs: Need help with an order, product question, or account issue? Our support team is here to assist.
Email: support@vsport.local — include your order number for faster service.
Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00–18:00 (local time). We aim to respond within one business day.
For shipping updates, check your order status in Account → Orders after signing in.
For privacy or data requests, mention "Privacy" in your subject line.
